speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Zenith Forge. Now come. Follow me." And he tugs the chains with a sudden burst and pulls you along. As you begin walking, he begins to talk about how: "Whaska is one of the few giants that still maintains the privilege of freedom. There was a coup within their people a few years ago, seemingly orchestrated by some of their own. As such most of the fire giants in the city either were cast out or were placed in chains. And the few that remain, one of which you'll speak with on this day, is one of the ones that sold them out. So. I hope you have your questions ready."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispering) Whaska. (louder) Mm-hmm.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Let us find our way to the Zenith Forge where he does most of his work."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Forge?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It's been about an hour now, so that's past.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: The Chuckle Palace?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: The Chocolate Palace.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "The Charcoal Palace. You are listening; you are not supposed to speak."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Like charcoal.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Charcoal Palace." The air itself here, as you're spending more time outside-- and the interior of these buildings aren't meant to detract heat or cool either. Most if not all of the denizens here are well-tempered against the heat. As you guys are being dragged along, I need all of you who do not have fire resistance to go ahead and make another constitution saving throw.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Damn it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I'm a master of a good burn. Does that give me fire resistance?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Nope! So I think that you don't have to worry about it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I had cast fire resistance on me.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes, and how long does that last?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It lasts an hour. Has it been an hour?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You do. You see as the sun which--and you've been here for two hours now so you have some time. It's still very busy in the city. And as you pass by, you see many efreet on their own business. Some coasting at different levels of height, some just traversing through. Occasionally you come across strange, horned devil-like entities that work, walk in clusters.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: In the ground or raised or--?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: In the ground. Similar to how you see most city aqueducts constructed, except for the Sea of Fire spills into it. Anything going over there is uncomfortable as the heat grows astronomically as you pass over each bridge and the air itself becomes more sulfurous. And you find yourselves coughing autonomically as the fumes reach your lungs. You begin to pass by--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're walking out in public at this point, right? And there's people about? We see other beings about?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Apparently!" Motions over and Senokir, other hand out, is like, "And around this way, you can see the Fenstral Spire, which is a wonderful craft fair that happens once every two weeks!" Uten goes back to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: As I trail backwards behind her you hear twins, motherfucker! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you begin to approach a large black and gray building built from heavy, heavy stones--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I talk to Uten a little bit while we're walking?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is she picking your nose?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I thought the same thing! It's a scratch, no pick!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So, do you play tour guide often to newcomers in this town?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Uten says, "It is not often that we take newcomers under our wing like this. Usually they are either customers or, well, to be arrested shortly. So, no, this is probably the first tour we've given. Senokir seems to strangely enjoy it."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Playing tour guide?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "We've been in business together for about the better part of ten years. I've only been here about 12. It was a very dangerous scavenge to begin, but at least the laws of the normal world do not apply here. I have no idea how long Senokir's been here. He keeps a lot to himself, that one, but I trust him."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Can I talk to Uten a little bit while we're walking?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is she picking your nose?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I thought the same thing! It's a scratch, no pick!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: So, do you play tour guide often to newcomers in this town?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Uten says, "It is not often that we take newcomers under our wing like this. Usually they are either customers or, well, to be arrested shortly. So, no, this is probably the first tour we've given. Senokir seems to strangely enjoy it."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Playing tour guide?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Apparently!" Motions over and Senokir, other hand out, is like, "And around this way, you can see the Fenstral Spire, which is a wonderful craft fair that happens once every two weeks!" Uten goes back to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's making shit up as he's walking.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Seems he has quite a love for the City of Brass. How long have you all been residents here?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "It's been a while. Since the upset socially, I found it best to not deal with them outside of a customer-patron relationship."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Where are we, Master?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Welcome to the Zenith Forge. So, once we enter, I would have to be the one to ask all the questions, but that would be difficult for us to do. So the choice is yours. Either we try and find a careful way to funnel questions, or we put our cards on the table and you do the talking."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Well, I can alter myself to look like you, if you can hang back.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You already look like Uten and other compatriots. You can still speak, I just want to make sure that, well, our slaves don't talk out of turn."

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Sure.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Have you spoken with a fire giant before?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It lasts for up to ten minutes, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh, do I have to stop? I can't do it as we're walking?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I mean you can do it, it's a visual thing.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We can hold him.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Senokir, hold?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: One moment!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Senokir?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Yes?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're going to--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Hang on, a little bit of preparation on our end, if you don't mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "All right. Then decide. I mean, if you wish to progress--"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: As he's talking I start doing it. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right, it's really quick. And you basically have to pull out your component from the side there, it's a little twig and you snap it. And you continue the ritual. All right. You concentrate for a second as he's talking, and currently no. You do not sense it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay. And that lasts for ten minutes?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But it can point us in the right direction.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Between the two of you, given about five minutes, you guys could eventually carry it.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Thank you. I go over and I start trying to (grunts) pick it up.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a strength check. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Use your legs. Bend the knees.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Oh, no!

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Pull a hammie?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Eight total.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You can get it a few inches off the ground--

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or just a check, right? Just a straight check?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, just with your modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay, then five.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You get it a few inches off the ground before it (crashing sound) hits the ground with a resounding clang.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: (hisses in pain)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Almost got your finger, but you're fine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Do you want me to?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: C'mon, Beast Mode!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: You're so strong, Pike.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll give it a try.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: C'mon, Pike! Lift that thing!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Get it!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, definitely not. Just doesn't even move. That's a seven.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: An extended period of time to make it towards where the mines and the pits are for the next hour or so, walking through the streets. As you're heading in this northward direction, you pass by a series of intersections where a lot of these lava rivers merge and splinter off. You can see there are individuals that are taking elements of it and carrying off large metallic buckets. You also notice in the distance one very terrifying-looking structure. All the rest have this beautiful, grandiose design to them. There is one that looks like it is made of curved obsidian spikes, like a series of giant, clawed hands climbing up over themselves. It forms a bastion in the center of the city. This is on the outskirts of the furnace that you walked past or saw in the distance when you first left Senokir's establishment. Pressing beyond that, you notice that there is a heavy number of nasty-looking devilish entities that seem to be running patrol around the outside of that building. You get the essence that there's a heavy devil presence in the City of Brass. Devils of multiple kinds, you gather. Many you've never seen before. But they seem to be gathering around and have that same terrifying essence to them. You see some that are humanoid, but covered in long chains with hooks at the end, dragging on the ground behind them. You see some that are these nasty little impish looking creatures that leap from section to section and usually travel in packs. But they all have business; they carry small satchels at their side. They mingle with the rest of the efreet and the other denizens of the city unmolested, unbothered, unprovoked.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Got to take a second to switch hands.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Wait, wait, oh oh oh!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: You walk backwards.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We bought the new bed frame. It's called the "Nupe."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: No you go first, you go first.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll go backwards, I'll go backwards.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Turn it over!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are you okay going down the stairs? Okay, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. (clanging sound effects)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: As we leave, I give the saddest puppy stare to that wallet on the side of his belt and wish upon a star. And then I leave.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All right. You guys make your way out into the main thoroughfare. Senokir turns back. "Very well. I know where this shrine is, so follow me."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (imitates Senokir) Great. We will.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (imitates Senokir) Great.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) Weird.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Are you mocking me?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What? What are you talking about?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Right. Continue, please." Pulls the chains a little bit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (choking noise)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As you continue, eventually you come upon the outside of this beautiful temple that is made of hundreds of heavy, dark iron and metal hammers that are all molded together in this mish-mash that forms this giant archway. As you walk past it, Senokir pipes up again, "And that is the Smoking Hammer Shrine that was spoken of. Which means--" And he points over to the right. There you can see-- it resembles a home that is conical in its advancement. It's thick at the base, and it spirals upward, made of black metallic substance. Rough around the edges, like it's been pushed together, similar to the shrine you saw. But it's this spiral that continues upward. This very thick spiral that quickly tapers off into a point. You see there are levels to it, and there appear to be openings and windows. This is an abode of some kind. A very massive abode, and to a certain extent one of the more impressive buildings you've seen in this immediate vicinity.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I wave at a couple. Quietly.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: From a distance, you're not getting too close. No one seems to pay mind.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Senokir, what is that place?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That is the embassy. We shouldn't go by there."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why? What's in the embassy?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Well, that's where the ambassadors to the Nine Hells reside."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Right. Nine. That's a lot.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Is it like a cityscape?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: We have diplomatic immunity.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Senokir, did that exchange go about the way you thought it would?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Sure." (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Good.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: This guy likes to party.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Dang it, Bobby! All right. Thanks to the rough construction of this building, it isn't too difficult to find handholds, though there are certain moments where you have to leap and catch to get there. It takes you probably the better part of 15 minutes to eventually get up to that area. The first opening you see, even though it's a window, is an oval porthole in the side of that structure. As you glance inside, getting your arm up in there, you are inside a servants' quarters, but even the servants' quarters are very large. It's simple. You see two beds in there, but the beds are 30 feet long, 20 feet wide with various hides and furs that have been patched together in this quilt-like fashion, but haphazard in their stitching. Other than that, it's not very pretty.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: It's going to be right on the inside, hanging on the wall.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Can't Vax do some Spider-Man shit and check out the windows? He's all invisible.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's risky.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Why? If he falls, nobody will see it. We'll just hear it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah! And then you pretend like you tripped!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Are there really high windows?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There are no windows on the bottom floor. On the second floor up, there are, yes. Which is about 40 feet up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: No, it's definitely on the first floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: They're 20 feet high, so, high up.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's what it is. It's on the first floor, up high.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So let me go.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, dude! This is what you do!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He just said there were windows on the second floor.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm already climbing. Would this be acrobatics?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: For climbing, this would be athletics.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Athletics. Dang it, Bobby. That's a 16.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Oh, you should never go to the embassy. But this Ghurrix is tied up with a lot of politics in this city. As much as I would love to squeeze what infernal life he has, I fear it would cause the execution of me and mine. So, I sit and fester with the need of vengeance. I need you, if you're as capable as you promise, to go and find Ghurrix, in whatever way you see fit, and carve the life from his body. Now, Ghurrix frequents the Arches, which is the slave market of the city, where he finds rare and unique servants for the Nine Hells and his masters there. Goes about once a week and is probably due there in a day or two. Go, slay Ghurrix, and return to me with no mention and no trace that can be brought back to my home. Then the armor is yours, as is your freedom. There is no agreement. You've already agreed. So go."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: God! Matt! You!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Wow.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm really just bad at everything.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did you roll an 11?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I rolled an 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Oh my God!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You are a deity.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I wish I had this luck in Vegas! Like, literal gambling.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It's just four hours.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Best seven out of 13! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You have agreed to our accord as per the agreement."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I have agreed. I'm already your slave, so I couldn't really say no. So yes, I agree to our accord. What favor can I grant you?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You will have your freedom and the armor you seek. My lover does not live because of an altercation with one who frequents the city. My partner, Drogat, died needlessly in the streets of an innocent altercation with Ghurrix, a pit fiend that lives at the embassy."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (groaning) Ah jeez.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sorry, we're not supposed to go to the embassy. We were told so by our tour guide.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: "Two days. Go!"

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, we accept. Thank you, my master, we will go do so right away. Two days, you say?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Two days, yes."

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Does that mean we don't have to answer to you anymore? You're equal to us?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: High five, yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I release you from your slavery.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: And into another one.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: What does he look like?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She reaches down to the side of the desk, and pulls out a very small book, relative size, and flips through, and opens a page to turn towards you. "This is what I seek to see destroyed. You can tell, Ghurrix wears a symbol of his station. It is a thick, black chain. And at the bottom, it has the symbol of two manacles intertwined within a red symbol that pulses with anger. That is your mark."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Are you sure you don't want just a game of Pinochle instead?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You try my patience, small one."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Please, call me Kenny Rogers.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: It would fit a human. A minute passes. You hear the footfalls return. As she comes down the stairs, with her hand in a fist, she throws her hand open. Hitting the ground, and scattering across the stonework, some of them stopping at your feet or beyond, a series of black, metal rings that match the ones that the two giants wear around their neck.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Let's go, slaves! I'm sorry, equals, peers, let's go!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys step down, the two giant guards step back and begin to walk towards the door to let you out.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Actually, madam, master. Do you have any symbols that you can give us, like something we could show people so they don't try to claim us for themselves? Because we're a lot smaller than everyone else here. Something that shows that we're your slaves?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Hmm." She gets up from behind the desk, and walks up the stairs for a moment.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Is she out of the room?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's out of the room, currently.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: And two other giants are behind us?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What are they doing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: They're standing watching all of you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: All of us except for--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm standing there, but I'm not--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Jump up and fucking see how it's attached to the wall!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How big is the suit of armor, the Dawnmartyr?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: That's okay. So. You guys have returned to Senokir and Uten's establishment to rest until you feel is necessary to undertake this endeavor. But it is your guys' prerogative as to if you want to wait over the next day, day and a half to jump to it or is there anything you want to do to prepare for this circumstance? What do you want to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Grog, pick her up, she looks like she needs some water.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Grog, I'm just so tired.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You look so mopey.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I feel very mopey.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Did you want a piggyback ride?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: All right, I pick her up and I put her on my shoulder.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys eventually make your way back, being led by Senokir back to his establishment. Let's go ahead and take a little break for now. Go ahead and use the restroom--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: You looked like the creepy guy was saying we should take a break for just a second.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "That would be frightening, wouldn't it?" All right, guys, we'll be back in just a few minutes, we'll see you in a second. [break]

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Welcome back everyone to Critical Role. That was terrible.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: The timing. Well, she's been gone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: She's been gone a while. It's okay, welcome back.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Ashley, you're amazing.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'm just not working right now.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You're not entirely certain, comparatively the time. You feel like you've been here for, I mean, a while. By the cycle of the sun-like light source in the sky here on the plane, it seems like you've been here for about a day.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: In case it's magically locked down?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: In case it's magically locked down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, that's pretty smart.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: In which the phrase, "I have many enchantments upon my home," led me to believe there's probably--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I really don't see what the problem is, right? Hellfiend goes, "Oh, time to go shopping for slaves." He walks up to the Arches, we set a trap, Vax goes stabby-stab-stab, Percy goes (gunshot), Pike goes, (high-pitched) "Hi", and like, donesky!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You're writing the best children's book ever.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I mean, I'm down, I think that's a great plan, Grog.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: He also said that the pit fiend could be there in one to two days.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Could be there tomorrow?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Also, do we know how much time passes in the fire plane versus the real world?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay, for the purposes of the narrative, you spend the next few hours with Pike in your room, beginning to learn elements of the alphabet of Common. You go through enough of it where you pick up some of it and as the potion fades, so does the memory of the last three hours. (yelling)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Just Common letters? Yes, I can show you the alphabet. I'll write it out. Okay? Do you know how to spell your name? Okay. It's very easy. You have four letters in your name, but there are two of the same letter. So you really only have three letters in your name.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: How many-- I'm not so hot on the numbers, either.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay, well, we won't talk about numbers. Okay, what's the first letter of the alphabet? This you know.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: G.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: That's the first letter of your name.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Oh, it is!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yes, but that's not the first letter of the alphabet. You've said it before. Ah--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Ah-- I. Hey!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh! It's the first letter, well, you wouldn't know that, because you don't know how to spell.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fucking A, this is tough.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh! You said it!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Fucking? A?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: A! A is the first letter of the alphabet.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: A. Ay. A. A.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: And we can keep going-- (laughter)

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Great. All right. So, as you guys all come to consciousness the next day, you gather your things and you step out of the mansion into the center of Senokir's shop.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That'd the Greater Restoration, technically, to try and--

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: There's AC in here, isn't there?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: There's AC.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: In the mansion. Not in the studio. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Greater Restoration reduces exhaustion. But you can do that as well.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll cast Greater Restoration before bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So you reduce a level of exhaustion.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I am going to send a little time working on a couple things for the fort when we get back. Netting ammo for the trebuchet, just a sketch. To start to design a very simple bolo for the trebuchet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Just designing?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Just penciling and then penciling-- I've got a notion for a watch tower that's super super simple. Platform for two people, tops, with a rope that connects to a bell so when you start heading down it, it goes (high voice) Fuck!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: With the long rest, you recover a point of exhaustion, so you'll all back to baseline, including you, Pike, because your Greater Restoration. Your spells are recovered, HP is recovered, if there was any loss of it. So, the day is yours, what do you wish to do?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I'll cast Greater Restoration before bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So you reduce a level of exhaustion.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Great. All right. So, as you guys all come to consciousness the next day, you gather your things and you step out of the mansion into the center of Senokir's shop.

preceding_turns.text: Do we recover our point of exhaustion when we sleep?
